text:
# Respondent: John Doe

Child(ren):
Emma Doe (DOB: 01/01/2015) Note: Dates of birth in this guide are written in the UK
format: day / month / year (DD/MM/YYYY). For example, 01/04/2015 means 1 April 2015.

metadata.source: Guide for Litigants in Person: Preparing Court Bundles (March 2026)
